title: Wookiee dual missile turret

{{Quote|In the upper levels of each of the four bays you'll find a Wookiee dual missile turret. Only with the combined firepower of all four turrets do we have the slightest chance of taking down this juggernaught [sic].|[[01/425]] advises Delta Squad on taking down a Separatist Cruiser|<ref name="SWRC" />}}
The '''Wookiee dual missile turret''', or '''Wookiee Dual Launcher''', was a defensive [[Anti-aircraft gun|anti-air]] emplacement individually produced by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Turret/Legends|turret]] crafters and employed during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. The turret contained two explosive warhead-tipped [[Missile/Legends|missiles]] in as many launch tubes. It had a slow rate of fire but could pierce the [[Hull/Legends|hull]] of a [[Starship/Legends|starship]], making the [[Missile launcher/Legends|launcher]] perfectly suited to defend Wookiees from [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] or Separatist forces. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] of [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] used several Wookiee dual missile turrets to destroy a Separatist [[Recusant-class light destroyer/Legends|cruiser]] during their [[Mission to Kashyyyk (Clone Wars)|mission]] to the Wookiee [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

==Description==
The [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] dual [[Missile/Legends|missile]] [[Turret/Legends|turret]],<ref name="SWRC" /> also known as the Wookiee Dual Launcher,<ref name="site">{{LucasArts|url=games/swrepubliccommando/hud.html|text=''Star Wars Republic Commando''}}</ref> was a defensive [[Anti-aircraft gun|anti-aircraft]] turret individually manufactured by Wookiee turret crafters.<ref name="RCPG" /> It had a flat base with a raised [[Gunner/Legends|gunnery]] platform, from which a single operator could defend a position from aerial assault while protected by two physical shields, both [[Color/Legends|colored]] brown with gold highlights. Two large, gray [[Missile launcher/Legends|launch tubes]]<ref name="SWRC" /> fired explosive warhead-tipped missiles. The launcher suffered from a slow rate of fire, though the powerful missiles could pierce the [[Hull/Legends|hull]] of a [[Starship/Legends|starship]]<ref name="RCPG" /> and, with repeated fire, could even destroy a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]].<ref name="SWRC" /> The turret was most effective against large flying targets rather than ground units.<ref name="RCPG" />

==History==
The Wookiee dual missile turret saw use during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], with the Republic-aligned Wookiees using the emplacements to defend against [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] or Separatist aerial assaults.<ref name="RCPG" /> During the conflict, in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="date">''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' places ''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]''{{'s}} [[Mission to Kashyyyk (Clone Wars)|events]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] 1,088 [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], which {{InsiderCite|84|Republic HoloNet News Special Inaugural Edition 16:5:241}} and ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' respectively date to c. [[Great ReSynchronization|13:5:21]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. According to {{CSWECite|I|312|Galactic Standard Time}}, [[Galactic Standard Calendar|Galactic Standard Time]] was based on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] [[Coruscant Prime/Legends|solar]] cycle, which lasted 368 days, according to ''[[The Essential Atlas]]''. Therefore, the ''Republic Commando'' events on Kashyyyk correspond to the year [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] of the Republic's [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] were deployed to the Wookiee [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], where they employed multiple Wookiee dual missile turrets to [[Mission to Kashyyyk (Clone Wars)|destroy]] a Separatist [[Recusant-class light destroyer/Legends|''Recusant''-class light destroyer]].<ref name="SWRC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The turret was first featured on the [[LucasArts]] website for the [[2005]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'', where it was labeled as the "Wookie Dual Launcher," including the misspelling of "Wookiee." In the game itself it was identified as a Wookiee dual missile turret.<ref name="SWRC" /> The [[2008]] novel tie-in ''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' by [[Karen Traviss]] describes the Wookiee emplacement as a [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] battery with a seat<ref name="Order">''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]''</ref> instead of a standing platform for the gunner as depicted in the video game.<ref name="SWRC" />
